gate.exception: The 250 KB/1 MB target is not yet feasible while shipping the documented standalone CLI/MCP tooling, deterministic change-integrity surfaces, schemas, and consumer guidance. Phase Z recalibrates once from clean Linux arkgate@3.7.0 source 6fa5079 / PR candidate b4f25a4 (484,608 packed bytes, 1,632,090 unpacked bytes, 135 files) with at least 10% headroom: 534,000 packed bytes, 1,796,000 unpacked bytes, and 149 files. Legacy migration/demo and experimental-runtime hardening guides remain repository-hosted, source maps were removed in V04, and this exception must be reconsidered before ArkGate 4.
